name: Inside Links
about: Inside Links Indoor Golf is an indoor golf center featuring four standard simulator bays with Foresight Launch Monitors and GSPro software, plus one enhanced 15-foot wide bay with 4k graphics. The facility offers a versatile environment for practice, play, and instruction, providing access to simulated golf courses from around the world. Pricing is tiered based on time of day and bay type, with memberships offering significant discounts for regular players. The venue hosts leagues, corporate events, and golf instruction with PGA professional Nick Maresca.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Foresight Launch Monitor technology in all bays
Variety of pricing options and membership tiers for different player types
PGA instruction available for skill development
Novelty 'carnival' games for entertainment and practice

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services available.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information provided on a food and beverage policy or BYOB rules.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Inside Links offers a junior membership program for players aged 17 and under, and children 13 and under must be accompanied by an adult.
